title: CSpec
description: Bridge component specification. `additionalProperties: true` is intentional — CSpecs may carry custom annotations (feature flags, experiments, team-specific extensions) not enumerated by the core schema. Tighten via consumer-defined schemas when needed.

name.description: kebab-case identifier for the spec (matches the filename).

archetype.description: High-level shape of the spec. Open string for extensibility; conventional values: card, screen, list-item, tag, button.

component.description: PascalCase name of the DS component this spec instantiates.

properties.description: Component property bag — flat key/value where keys may carry the Figma '#nodeId' suffix for non-variant props.

tokens.description: Design tokens referenced by the spec. Each token's `name` must be a `$category/path/segment` reference.

snapshot.description: Path to the *-snapshot.json file co-located with this spec (null when not yet shipped).
